recent_projects.name: wecom-bot-mcp-server-remotefile
recent_projects.summary: WeCom Bot MCP Server - A Python server for WeCom (WeChat Work) bot following the Model Context Protocol (MCP)
recent_projects.author: longhao

recent_projects.name: dvt-core
recent_projects.summary: DVT (Data Virtualization Tool) - Multi-source data federation and transformation with Spark-unified compute layer.
recent_projects.author: DVT Contributors

recent_projects.name: streamblocks
recent_projects.summary: Real-time extraction and processing of structured blocks from text streams

recent_projects.name: lk-moe
recent_projects.summary: lk_moe is a special NUMA extension of vllm that makes full use of CPU and memory resources, reduces GPU memory requirements, and features an efficient GPU parallel and NUMA parallel architecture, supporting hybrid inference for MOE large models.

recent_projects.name: build-meta-plus
recent_projects.summary: A drop-in replacement for setuptools.build_meta that adds automated pre- and post-build hooks for cleanup and asset generation

recent_projects.name: ai-rulez
recent_projects.summary: ⚡ One config to rule them all. Centralized AI assistant configuration management - generate rules for Claude, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf and more from a single YAML file.
recent_projects.author: Na'aman Hirschfeld

recent_projects.name: aimodelshare
recent_projects.summary: Deploy locally saved machine learning models to a live REST API and integrated dashboard.
